Z[c] ˜ dbern(p.adj[c]) # censoring status
p[c] <- pexp(cut[c],lambda[c+O]) # cumulative exp. dist.
lambda[c+O] <- exp(b0 + b1*group[c+O])
}
b0 ˜ dnorm(0, 0.01)
b1 ˜ dnorm(0, 0.01)
}
